manager_note: Read-only context. Accepted/rejected tactic or call text inside a preview is route-selection information, not the current proof-state error.

manager_actions.outcome: The manager returned read-only context for the current goal.

notes.message: Compiler emits only the mechanical `={glob ...}` frame; the semantic conjuncts are the agent's to add.

items.why: Shared abstract oracle modules E, M must stay synchronized across the adversary call; mechanical glob frame, daemon-confirmed to apply.
items.verification: not daemon-verified against the current goal

items.why: No mechanical `={glob}` frame applies at this call — build the call invariant from THIS development's own in-scope predicates (an invariant conjunct can be a guarded implication / size-or-count bound / domain fact, not only an equality). In-scope forms + named predicates (use lookup_symbol for the full definition of any): guarded implication (guard => relation) — andb: Block.offun (fun i=> andw b1.[i] b2.[i]). lemma oneb_neq0: oneb <> zerob. proof. rewrite blockP negb_forall /=; exists 0=> /=. by rewrite !offunE // onew_neq0.  | relational equality — pad: let p = padding (pad_length m) in os2bs (m ++ (t2os t) ++ p). op unpad (bs : block list) = let os = bs2os bs in let l = o2int (last witness os) in let m = take
